label: New — Add Grow Guide tasks to your calendar
items: Each section of a plant's Grow Guide (Water, Pruning, Harvesting, Sowing, Feeding, etc.) now has an "Add to calendar" button — one tap turns the AI's seasonal advice into real recurring blueprints or one-off tasks on your schedule.

Hemisphere-aware: the AI's "spring" lands in Mar–May for Northern hemisphere users and Sep–Nov for Southern; the start dates and end dates on your calendar are computed accordingly. If you're past this year's window, the task is scheduled for next year's window automatically.
Per-instance attach: if you already have the plant in your Shed, the sheet lets you attach the tasks to a specific inventory item (e.g. "Sungold in the back bed"). Otherwise tasks land home-wide.
Duplicate-aware: tasks that look similar to a blueprint you already have are flagged "may already exist" and pre-unchecked, so you don't accidentally double up on a watering schedule.

label: Bulk add
items: At the top of every Grow Guide there's now an "Add all N tasks to calendar" button — useful for setting up the full year of care for a plant in one go.
